title: France bets big on AI: Macron govt invests over $750 million to build chatbot for state services

title: Study identifies 60 workplace skills that AI may struggle to replace
description: As artificial intelligence transforms workplaces around the world, a new study suggests some of the most valuable skills of the future may have little to do with coding or data. Leadership, teamwork and negotiation emerged among the abilities least likely to be overtaken by machines.
content:
As artificial intelligence steadily takes over everything from writing emails to analysing spreadsheets, many workers are wondering which skills will still matter in the years ahead. According to a new study, the answer may be surprisingly human.

title: 'Touch and Technology Must Go Hand in Hand,' Says DCDC Kidney Care Founder Aseem Garg
description: Artificial intelligence can transform healthcare delivery and improve efficiency, but it cannot replace empathy, trust and human connection, healthcare leaders said at the MindMine Summit. Experts also highlighted affordability, innovation and scaling healthcare startups as key priorities.
content:
Artificial intelligence can help reduce costs, improve efficiency and expand access to healthcare, but it cannot replace the empathy and human connection that patients need, healthcare leaders said at the MindMine Summit in New Delhi.

title: Tech Layoffs Hit 2-Year High As AI Cited Top Reason For Cuts: Report
description: The technology sector has hit a major two-year peak in job cuts, with artificial intelligence now cited as the primary driver behind the staff reductions.

description: The boom in artificial-intelligence stocks looks set to run further, according to a Bank of America Corp. survey, which found the majority of investors believe that the fear of missing out is continuing to drive the trade.
